raw_consumer_statement: I opened a dispute with Citi. I emailed in supporting evidence when requested. Then I received a letter that my dispute was rejected. I called and they said it was because I had not responded to a letter. I had not received this letter. They sent a new one. I responded immediately. My dispute was rejected again, this time they said because I didnt respond to the first letter in XXXX ( the one I did not receive ), the dispute could not be reopened with XXXX per federal regulation. I read the information on the FTC website and I did not find that regulation.
